title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and chat models with tool-calling support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, and manage local models idiomatically.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fuzzy-finding model selection and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement with inline completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for using Ollama models in production-grade RAG & agent pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama with session memory and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-napi
summary: Official Node-API native add-on for high-performance Node.js bindings to Ollama’s C++ core.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# .NET SDK with full API coverage and both synchronous and async streaming.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library used internally by Ollama CLI; exposes chat, generate, pull, and push APIs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into guild chats with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-Mode to answer questions with local Ollama models and optional rate limits.

title: ollama-mistral-finetune
summary: Tutorial repo showing how to fine-tune Mistral 7B with LoRA, convert to GGUF, and load into Ollama.
